seoTitle: Pelican vs Pelican Waters — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pelican and Pelican Waters. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pelican vs Pelican Waters: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pelican and Pelican Waters.
heading: Pelican vs Pelican Waters — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pelican, Queensland and Pelican Waters, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pelican Waters has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Pelican (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pelican or Pelican Waters safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pelican has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Pelican Waters scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pelican scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Pelican Waters scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pelican or Pelican Waters?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pelican Waters has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
